deterministic_setup.reason: log4j-1.2-api is a compatibility bridge over Log4j 2; normal Logger/appender/configuration paths reference org.apache.logging.log4j.core classes, while log4j-core is optional in the artifact POM and is not guaranteed by the generated scaffold.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #6772 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-1.2-api:2.18.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failing assertion in PropertySetterTest appears to be a version-behavior/test issue rather than proof of missing setup; Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
Some optional legacy surfaces such as JMS appenders may require additional optional APIs, but they are not necessary for baseline meaningful bridge coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Basic Log4j 1.2 bridge usage forwards legacy org.apache.log4j APIs into Log4j 2 and needs the Log4j Core runtime implementation; the artifact POM marks log4j-core optional, so the normal scaffold may only bring log4j-api and fail before meaningful logger/appender/configuration coverage.
